title: On the degeneration of the Frölicher spectral sequence and small deformations
abstract: AbstractWe study the behavior of the degeneration at the second step of the Frölicher spectral sequence of a 𝒞∞ family of compact complex manifolds. Using techniques from deformation theory and adapting them to pseudo-differential operators we prove a result à la Kodaira-Spencer for the dimension of the second step of the Frölicher spectral sequence and we prove that, under a certain hypothesis, the degeneration at the second step is an open property under small deformations of the complex structure.
